name: D.D. Guide
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>異</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>次</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>元</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>への<ruby lang="jp"><rb>案</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>内</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ない</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned, give control of it to your opponent. During each player's End Phase, your opponent selects 1 card from the Graveyard of this card's controller and removes it from play.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned, give control of it to your opponent. During each player's End Phase, your opponent selects 1 card from the Graveyard of this card's controller and removes it from play.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned, give control of it to your opponent. During each player's End Phase, your opponent selects 1 card from the Graveyard of this card's controller and removes it from play.
